scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns default OutputSettings instance when none has been set
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // no setter invoked
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is non-null and equals doc.outputSettings(); default charset is UTF-8; default syntax is html; default prettyPrint is true

scenarios.description: outputSettings() returns the same instance after setting a custom OutputSettings
scenarios.precondition: Document doc = new Document("http://example.com"); // setter used to inject new settings
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is the custom OutputSettings instance passed to outputSettings(outputSettings) and reflects its configured values
